steps.title: Check the plotted points
steps.content: A solution to the inequality is any point inside the shaded region shown in the coordinate plane. Test each listed ordered pair by locating it on the graph.

steps.title: Identify the shaded point
steps.content: The points $(-5,0)$, $(0,5)$, and $(0,-5)$ lie outside the shaded region. The point $(5,0)$ lies inside the shaded region, so it is a solution to the inequality. The answer is D.
